---
title: "Plot report"
format: html
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

## Run log

Run log file: `plot_run_log_20260115_205648.txt`

## Interactive plots

### XY_Column_4_vs_delta_mean_20260115_205646.plotly.html

```{=html}
<iframe src="XY_Column_4_vs_delta_mean_20260115_205646.plotly.html" width="100%" height="650" style="border:0;"></iframe>
```
